## Problem

What public-building problem should this solve?

## Proposed solution

What should BuildEcho do?

## Loop stage

Which stage does this improve?

- [ ] Build
- [ ] Tell
- [ ] Listen
- [ ] Decide
- [ ] Build again

## Human approval boundary

Does this feature require publishing, replying, mentioning, or contacting a
community?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes, and it includes human approval

## Additional context

Add examples, links, or related projects.
